title: DINOForge Projectile Definition
description: Schema for DINOForge projectile definition files (projectiles/*.yaml).

speed.description: Travel speed in world units per second.

visual_prefab.description: Visual prefab asset ID for the projectile in flight.

impact_effect.description: VFX asset ID played on impact.

faction.description: Firing faction id (e.g. 'republic', 'cis'). Drives the in-flight blaster-bolt emission colour.

bolt_color.description: Hex colour (e.g. '#3399FF') for the glowing energy bolt; overrides the runtime default for this faction.
